name: avatar
title: Avatar
description: Terminal-inspired avatar with image support, monospace initials fallback, and group stacking with overflow.

content.text: Avatar.Image and Avatar.Fallback must be used within Avatar

How avatars are spaced. "overlap" (default) stacks them, "gap" adds spacing between.

content.text: w-20 resize-x overflow-auto border border-dashed border-foreground/20 p-2

docs.description: Terminal-inspired avatar with image support, monospace initials fallback, and group stacking with overflow.

anatomy.name: Avatar
anatomy.note: Square avatar with src/fallback/size. Shows image or monospace initials.

anatomy.name: AvatarGroup
anatomy.note: Overlapping stack of avatars with max overflow (+N indicator).

anatomy.name: AvatarIndicator
anatomy.note: Overflow count badge (+N). Auto-rendered by AvatarGroup, or usable standalone.

notes.title: Image Fallback
notes.content: When src fails to load, Avatar gracefully falls back to the fallback initials. If no fallback is provided, '?' is shown.

notes.title: Terminal Style
notes.content: Square shape with a border and monospace font for initials — following the @diffgazer/ui terminal-inspired aesthetic.

notes.title: Spacing
notes.content: AvatarGroup supports spacing='overlap' (default, stacked look) or spacing='gap' (spaced apart). Use 'gap' inside Select triggers or inline layouts where overlap looks cramped.

notes.title: Composition
notes.content: Avatar works standalone or inside AvatarGroup. Combine Avatar with public Select parts to build avatar pickers.
